# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Purpose

This is the [GitHub profile README repository](https://docs.github.com/en/account-and-profile/setting-up-and-managing-your-github-profile/customizing-your-profile/managing-your-profile-readme) for `CPLADRAGON` (Boyu Wang). The `README.md` at the root is rendered publicly on the GitHub profile page.

## What Lives Here

- `README.md` — profile page rendered on GitHub; uses GitHub Flavored Markdown with HTML, animated SVGs, and external badge/stats services
- `Resume_WANGBOYU.pdf` — linked from the README as a downloadable resume; must stay committed at the repo root

## External Services Used

| Service | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `capsule-render.vercel.app` | Animated wave header and footer banners |
| `readme-typing-svg.demolab.com` | Animated typing text greeting |
| `github-readme-stats.vercel.app` | GitHub activity stats cards and top-languages card |
| `streak-stats.demolab.com` | GitHub streak stats card |
| `img.shields.io` | Social/skill/tool badge images |
| `komarev.com/ghpvc` | Profile view counter |

## Conventions

- All stats widgets use `theme=tokyonight&hide_border=true` for visual consistency
- Social and skill badges use `style=for-the-badge`; project repo badges use `style=flat-square`
- The resume download URL follows the pattern: `https://github.com/CPLADRAGON/CPLADRAGON/raw/main/Resume_WANGBOYU.pdf`
- When adding new projects, follow the existing pattern: H3 heading with link, italicised score/context, brief description, status code snippet, and a flat-square repo badge
- GitHub profile READMEs support HTML tags (`<div>`, `<p>`, `<img>`, `<a>`) for layout alignment that Markdown alone cannot achieve
